categories.name: Referral Request
categories.description: Ask for referrals from satisfied clients. Best after giving first.
categories.triggerTiming: Timed delay or manual after relationship established
categories.notes: Works best AFTER at least one 'give' card. Never as first touch.

categories.name: Still Here / Re-engagement
categories.description: Reconnect with clients who have gone quiet or leads that went cold.
categories.triggerTiming: Triggered by inactivity period or manual selection
categories.notes: Tone should be warm, not desperate. 'Just checking in' not 'why haven't you called.'

categories.name: Apology / Service Recovery
categories.description: Acknowledge a mistake or service issue. Rebuild trust.
categories.triggerTiming: Manual. After service issue is resolved.
categories.notes: Powerful because almost nobody does this. Turns detractors into advocates.

categories.name: Holiday / Seasonal
categories.description: Warm holiday wishes. Thanksgiving, New Year, or seasonal greeting.
categories.notes: Avoid religious-specific unless you know the client. Thanksgiving and New Year are safest.

categories.name: Sympathy / Thinking of You
categories.description: Acknowledge difficult times: loss, illness, hardship. Pure empathy.
categories.whenToSend: Within a week of learning about situation
categories.triggerTiming: Manual only. Requires awareness and sensitivity.
categories.notes: No business content whatsoever. Just human compassion. Very memorable.

categories.name: Check-In / How's Everything
categories.description: Simple touchpoint between major interactions. Keeps you top of mind.
categories.notes: Not a sales pitch. Genuine 'how are things going' with your contact info.

categories.name: Event Invitation
categories.description: Invite to webinar, seminar, appreciation event, or community event.
categories.notes: Works well for client appreciation events, educational seminars.

categories.name: Just Because / Thinking of You
categories.description: No occasion needed. Just reaching out to stay connected.
categories.triggerTiming: Manual. Best triggered by seeing something that reminds you of them.
categories.notes: The rarest and most impactful. 'Saw this and thought of you' energy.

categories.name: Birthday
categories.description: Personal birthday greeting. No business content. Just human connection.
categories.triggerTiming: Triggered by client birthday field in CRM
categories.notes: Keep it simple. No sales ask. No business mention. Just 'Happy Birthday.'

categories.name: Anniversary
categories.description: Celebrate the anniversary of becoming your client.
categories.whenToSend: On or near the anniversary date
categories.triggerTiming: Triggered by client start date, annually
categories.notes: Works across all industries. '1 year ago you trusted me with X. Thank you.'

categories.name: Welcome / New Client
categories.description: Warm welcome after they become a client. Sets the tone for the relationship.
categories.triggerTiming: Triggered by new client record creation
categories.notes: Pair with Thank You or make this THE thank you. Don't send both separately.

categories.name: Thank You
categories.description: General gratitude after a transaction, meeting, or interaction. The foundation card.
categories.whenToSend: Within 3 days of transaction or meeting
categories.notes: Core card. Every industry uses this. Should be the first card in any sequence.

categories.name: Referral Thank You
categories.description: Thank someone who referred a new client to you. Reinforces referral behavior.
categories.triggerTiming: Triggered by referral source field or manual
categories.notes: Critical for referral-based businesses. 2-3x more referrals from same person after.

categories.name: Congratulations
categories.description: Celebrate a client's personal milestone: promotion, new baby, achievement.
categories.whenToSend: Within a week of learning about event
categories.triggerTiming: Manual. Requires awareness of client life events.
categories.notes: Social media monitoring is the trigger. Very high impact because it shows you pay attention.

categories.name: Review / Testimonial Request
categories.description: Gentle ask for an online review after positive experience.
categories.triggerTiming: Timed delay after transaction close date
categories.notes: Include specific review link not in the content, only on the back of the card as QR code (Google, Zillow, etc). Only send to happy clients.

templates.name: Thank You - Template 1
templates.content: Wanted to take a second to say thank you. Genuinely appreciate you trusting me with this.

templates.name: Thank You - Template 2
templates.content: Just a quick note to say thanks. Working with you was a pleasure and I don't take that for granted.

templates.name: Thank You - Template 3
templates.content: Thank you so much. I know you had options and I'm glad you chose to work with me. Looking forward to what's ahead.

templates.name: Thank You - Template 4
templates.content: Working with you was great. Thank you for making this easy and for putting your trust in me. Truly appreciate it.

templates.name: Thank You - Template 5
templates.content: Really just wanted you to know how much I appreciate this. Thank you. If there's ever anything I can do for you, just say the word.

templates.name: Birthday - Template 1
templates.content: Happy Birthday! Hope your day is a good one. Thinking of you today.

templates.name: Birthday - Template 2
templates.content: Just wanted to say Happy Birthday and hope you have a fantastic day. You deserve it.

templates.name: Birthday - Template 3
templates.content: Wishing you a wonderful birthday! Hope it's filled with good people and a little bit of fun.

templates.name: Birthday - Template 4
templates.content: Happy Birthday! Hope this year brings you everything you're working toward.

templates.name: Birthday - Template 5
templates.content: Thinking of you on your birthday. Hope it's a great one!

templates.name: Welcome / New Client - Template 1
templates.content: So glad to have you on board. Looking forward to working together and making sure you have everything you need.

templates.name: Welcome / New Client - Template 2
templates.content: Welcome! Really excited to work with you. Please don't hesitate to reach out anytime you have questions.

templates.name: Welcome / New Client - Template 3
templates.content: Just wanted to officially say welcome and thank you for choosing me. I'm going to take great care of you.

templates.name: Welcome / New Client - Template 4
templates.content: Happy to have you as a client. This is the beginning of what I know will be a long and great relationship.

templates.name: Welcome / New Client - Template 5
templates.content: You made a great decision. Welcome aboard and I look forward to earning your trust every step of the way.

templates.name: Referral Thank You - Template 1
templates.content: Heard you sent someone my way and I just want to say thank you. That means everything to me. I'll take great care of them.

templates.name: Referral Thank You - Template 2
templates.content: Thank you so much for the referral. The fact that you thought of me says a lot. I won't let them down.

templates.name: Referral Thank You - Template 3
templates.content: Just found out you referred someone to me. That truly is the highest compliment in my line of work. Thank you.

templates.name: Referral Thank You - Template 4
templates.content: You didn't have to send them my way, but you did. That means a lot. Thank you and I'll make sure they're well taken care of.

templates.name: Referral Thank You - Template 5
templates.content: Referrals are how I grow and they only happen when someone really trusts you. Thank you for trusting me. I appreciate it more than you know.

templates.name: Review / Testimonial Request - Template 1
templates.content: If our experience working together was worth it, I'd love it if you'd leave me a quick Google review. It helps more than you know and takes about two minutes.

templates.name: Review / Testimonial Request - Template 2
templates.content: Quick note to say it was a pleasure working with you. If you have a minute, an online review would go a long way for me. No pressure at all, just grateful either way.

templates.name: Review / Testimonial Request - Template 3
templates.content: If you felt good about how everything went, a short review would really help my business. I'd truly appreciate it. Thank you for even considering it.

templates.name: Review / Testimonial Request - Template 4
templates.content: Working with you was great. If you'd be willing to share that experience online, it would mean a lot. A quick review goes further than most people realize.

templates.name: Review / Testimonial Request - Template 5
templates.content: I'd love to hear what you thought about our experience together. If it was positive, sharing that online would be a huge help. Either way, thank you.

templates.name: Referral Request - Template 1
templates.content: If you ever come across someone who could use what I do, I'd love an introduction. I promise I'll treat anyone you send my way the same way I treated you.

templates.name: Referral Request - Template 2
templates.content: The best clients I get come from people like you. If you know anyone who might benefit from working with me, please think of me. I'd really appreciate it.

templates.name: Referral Request - Template 3
templates.content: I'd love to keep growing with people who are as great to work with as you. If someone comes to mind, please send them my way.

templates.name: Referral Request - Template 4
templates.content: Just wanted you to know my business runs mostly on referrals. If you know someone who could use my help, I'd be grateful for the introduction.

templates.name: Still Here / Re-engagement - Template 1
templates.content: Hey, it's been a while and I just wanted to check in. Hope everything's going well. I'm still here if you ever need anything.

templates.name: Still Here / Re-engagement - Template 2
templates.content: Realized it's been some time since we've talked. Wanted to reach out and say I'm still thinking of you and still here to help if the need ever comes up.

templates.name: Still Here / Re-engagement - Template 3
templates.content: Not sure what's been going on on your end, but I wanted to let you know I haven't forgotten about you. Reach out anytime.

templates.name: Still Here / Re-engagement - Template 4
templates.content: Just a quick note to say hello and remind you that I'm still around. No agenda. Just didn't want to lose touch.

templates.name: Holiday / Seasonal - Template 1
templates.content: Wishing you and your family a wonderful holiday season. Hope you get some real time to rest and enjoy the people around you.

templates.name: Holiday / Seasonal - Template 2
templates.content: As this year wraps up, I just wanted to say it's been a pleasure knowing you. Wishing you a great holiday and an even better new year.

templates.name: Holiday / Seasonal - Template 3
templates.content: Happy Thanksgiving! Hope you're surrounded by great food and even better company. Grateful to have you in my corner.

templates.name: Holiday / Seasonal - Template 4
templates.content: Wishing you a happy and healthy new year. Looking forward to what's ahead and grateful for the relationship we've built.

templates.name: Holiday / Seasonal - Template 5
templates.content: The holidays are a good reminder to slow down and appreciate the good stuff. Hope yours is full of it. Happy holidays!

templates.name: Congratulations - Template 1
templates.content: Just heard the news and had to write to say congratulations. That's a big deal and you deserve to celebrate it.

templates.name: Congratulations - Template 2
templates.content: Saw what you've been up to and wanted to say congrats. Really proud of you. You've worked hard for this.

templates.name: Congratulations - Template 3
templates.content: Congratulations! Not surprised at all, but still so excited for you. This is just the beginning.

templates.name: Congratulations - Template 4
templates.content: Huge congratulations on this milestone. I hope you're taking a moment to really soak it in. You've earned it.

templates.name: Sympathy / Thinking of You - Template 1
templates.content: I heard what you're going through and I just want you to know I'm thinking of you. There's nothing I can say to make it easier, but I'm here.

templates.name: Sympathy / Thinking of You - Template 2
templates.content: No words feel right at a time like this. Just wanted you to know you're in my thoughts and I'm here if you need anything at all.

templates.name: Sympathy / Thinking of You - Template 3
templates.content: I'm so sorry for your loss. Please know that you're surrounded by people who care, and I'm one of them.

templates.name: Sympathy / Thinking of You - Template 4
templates.content: Thinking of you during what I know is a really hard time. I hope you feel the support around you. I'm here.

templates.name: Anniversary - Template 1
templates.content: Can you believe it's already been a year? Wanted to mark the occasion and say thank you for sticking with me. It means a lot.

templates.name: Anniversary - Template 2
templates.content: One year ago you put your trust in me and I haven't taken that lightly. Thank you. Looking forward to many more.

templates.name: Anniversary - Template 3
templates.content: Happy anniversary! Grateful for the relationship we've built and looking forward to continuing to work together.

templates.name: Anniversary - Template 4
templates.content: Just realized it's been a year since we first worked together. Time flies. Thank you for your loyalty. It means the world.

templates.name: Check-In / How's Everything - Template 1
templates.content: Just checking in to see how things are going. No agenda, just wanted to say hello and make sure everything's good on your end.

templates.name: Check-In / How's Everything - Template 2
templates.content: Hey, been thinking about you lately. Hope life is treating you well. Reach out anytime, I'm always happy to chat.

templates.name: Check-In / How's Everything - Template 3
templates.content: Just a quick note to say I'm thinking of you and wanted to make sure you're doing well. I'm always here if you need anything.

templates.name: Check-In / How's Everything - Template 4
templates.content: Didn't want too much time to pass without reaching out. Hope everything's great. You know where to find me.

templates.name: Apology / Service Recovery - Template 1
templates.content: I just want to say I'm sorry. What happened wasn't acceptable and I know it. I'm committed to making it right and earning your trust back.

templates.name: Apology / Service Recovery - Template 2
templates.content: I've been thinking about this and I owe you a real apology. I dropped the ball and you deserved better. I'm sorry.

templates.name: Apology / Service Recovery - Template 3
templates.content: Thank you for your patience while we worked through this. I know it wasn't ideal and I take full responsibility. I appreciate you giving me the chance to make it right.

templates.name: Apology / Service Recovery - Template 4
templates.content: I wanted to write this by hand because an email didn't feel like enough. I'm truly sorry for the frustration and I'm committed to doing better.

templates.name: Event Invitation - Template 1
templates.content: I'd love to have you join us for an upcoming event. It's a great chance to connect in person and I think you'd enjoy it. Details inside.

templates.name: Event Invitation - Template 2
templates.content: I'm putting together something I think you'll find genuinely useful and I'd really like you to be there. Hope you can make it.

templates.name: Event Invitation - Template 3
templates.content: Just a heads up about an event I'm hosting. No sales pitch, just good people and useful information. Would love to see you there.

templates.name: Event Invitation - Template 4
templates.content: I wanted to personally invite you. These gatherings are always a good time and I think you'd get a lot out of it.

templates.name: Just Because / Thinking of You - Template 1
templates.content: No real reason for this note, just thought about you today and figured I'd say hello. Hope everything's going great.

templates.name: Just Because / Thinking of You - Template 2
templates.content: Saw something the other day that reminded me of you. Figured that was as good a reason as any to reach out. Hope you're doing well.

templates.name: Just Because / Thinking of You - Template 3
templates.content: Just wanted to drop a note to say I appreciate you. No agenda, no ask. Just glad you're in my world.

templates.name: Just Because / Thinking of You - Template 4
templates.content: Thought about you this week and realized I hadn't said hello in a while. So, hello! Hope things are going great.
